## Email Content

**From:** "Harvard Online" <harvardonline@mail.harvardonline.harvard.edu>
**Subject:** Make a difference in your group, community, or organization 💪
**Date:** Tue, 10 Mar 2026 08:20:12 -0600

### Body (preview)

Harvard Online

 



 Learn to lead from any position.



 Adaptive Leadership teaches a powerful, well-tested framework to help you lead more effectively in times of complexity and change. Going beyond theory, this course features the stories of former students who’ve used these tools to make a real difference in their organizations and communities.



 



 You’ll learn to identify the core issue at the heart of your challenge, view it through a broader systems lens, and make targeted changes that drive meaningful progress while building trust and empowering others to contribute along the way. 



Learn More

https://click.mail.harvardonline.harvard.edu/?

 





 

 "The key fundamentals that were taught throughout the course were relevant and broken down in ways that made the concepts feel achievable. The cases in this story were all engaging and different, yet all tied together with leadership ideologies. I greatly enjoyed this course and learning more about myself along the way."



 -Amy W., Adaptive Leadership participant

 



 Enrollment for Adaptive Leadership close April 2nd at 11:59 PM ET. Ensure your spot by enrolling today!



Enroll Now

https://click.mail.harvardonline.harvard.edu/?
